description:
Advances: specled.spec_review

Deliverable:
1. FindingsDelta (lib/specled_ex/review/findings_delta.ex): load_base_findings/2 resolves `git rev-parse <base>^{tree}` and reads the stored findings list from Evidence.Store.read/2 — the STORED base findings list is authoritative; classification algorithm (signature/1, differential/2, verdicts) byte-for-byte untouched (the spec's testable invariant: same classification algorithm over (stored base findings, live head findings); only the storage address of the base list changes). @state_path and git_show_state/2 deleted. base_reason distinguishes :base_evidence_absent vs :base_tree_unresolvable. Degraded verdict stays clean?: nil — indeterminate, never a pass.
2. Review + HTML copy: non-differential overview copy in lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex (~line 365, currently "No committed .spec/state.json at the base ref...") rewritten to name missing base evidence for the base tree and its heal path (mix spec.sync / a check run on that content); covers: comment block in review.ex (~line 120) updated. Consumer->data mapping now fully realized: AppendOnly = base specs+decisions (S1), FindingsDelta = base evidence (this stage), Review = both.
3. Spec amendments: spec_review.spec.md — specled.spec_review.findings_delta (~line 88, pins `git show <base>:.spec/state.json`), findings_delta_base_fallback, and the scenarios at ~lines 342-363 stating committed-state preconditions; verification targets stay test/specled_ex/review/findings_delta_test.exs.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: updated test/specled_ex/review/findings_delta_test.exs (commit_base_state/2 fixture helper replaced by an evidence-entry writer: commit base content, compute its ^{tree}, record entry via Evidence.Store), test/specled_ex/review_test.exs, test/specled_ex/review/html_test.exs, test/mix/tasks/spec_review_task_test.exs.
- Behaviors to demonstrate: differential classification against a stored base entry (same algorithm, new storage address); fallback when base entry absent -> indeterminate (clean?: nil, never pass) with distinct base_reason values; parser-upgrade transient documented by test (base entry with finding kinds the head run lacks -> resolved; head-new kinds -> introduced); full production path via spec_review_task_test.exs (base commit with evidence -> differential; without -> indeterminate copy naming heal path).
- Verification cadence:
  - Iteration tier: compile-graph-scoped checks only (mix test --stale or named files) plus mix spec.check --no-run-commands.
  - Final tier: full merge-gate suite run-until-green before IMPLEMENTED.
  - Verifier tier: flipped stubs + targeted/--stale only; no full suite.
- Standing bounce-class checks:
  - Production call site named for each new callable surface, with proving test on that production path
  - Fixture hygiene: tmp git repos torn down; no cross-test leakage
  - Spec surfaces fresh for every touched callable/config surface
  - Every conditional clause covered (entry present/absent, tree unresolvable, degraded copy branch)
- Call-site Integration: FindingsDelta.classify/3 already invoked from Review.build (review.ex:126, the `mix spec.review` production path); proven by spec_review_task_test.exs with a seeded base evidence entry -> differential output, absent entry -> indeterminate.

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/specled_ex/evidence/** (S2/S3 — read-only dep)
- lib/mix/tasks/** (other stages)
- lib/specled_ex/base_view.ex, lib/specled_ex/branch_check.ex, lib/specled_ex/append_only.ex (S1, done)
- docs/**, priv/spec_init/**, skills/**, .gitignore
Allowed touches (this stage may modify):
- lib/specled_ex/review/findings_delta.ex
- lib/specled_ex/review.ex
- lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex
- test/specled_ex/review/findings_delta_test.exs
- test/specled_ex/review_test.exs
- test/specled_ex/review/html_test.exs
- test/mix/tasks/spec_review_task_test.exs
- .spec/specs/spec_review.spec.md (requirement/scenario amendments per ADR evidence_orphan_branch_split + stub flips)
- .spec/state.json, .spec/realization_hashes.json (tool-managed regen — NOT scope creep)

Out of Scope (intent):
- Do NOT touch classification logic, signatures, or verdict shapes — provenance of the base list only.
- Do not remove state.json writes (S5): between S4 and S5 committed state.json is written-but-unread at review time — accepted one-stage overlap.
- No summary/state schema changes; normalize_for_state/1 stays a pure function.
- Degraded is never an error and never a pass.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly (mix compile --warnings-as-errors)
- [ ] Tests listed above pass
- [ ] Spec verification passes (mix spec.check; adjudicate against S1 baseline note)
- [ ] mix format --check-formatted; mix deps.unlock --check-unused
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket

comments.text:
IMPLEMENTED
Session: codex-fc422121
Log: /Users/mz/.local/state/agentic-runs/specled_ex/specled_-csg.4/codex-fc422121/log

Commit: bb8ca6a8e5cc2b407561f57c5ed62f100f911994
Files touched: .spec/specs/spec_review.spec.md, .spec/state.json, lib/specled_ex/review.ex, lib/specled_ex/review/findings_delta.ex, lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex, test/mix/tasks/spec_review_task_test.exs, test/specled_ex/review/findings_delta_test.exs, test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs
Tests added: SpecLedEx.Review.FindingsDeltaTest “exposes parser-upgrade transients as resolved base kinds and introduced head kinds”; Mix.Tasks.SpecReviewTaskTest “renders an indeterminate verdict and evidence healing instructions when base evidence is absent”
Verification stubs flipped: none (the existing findings-delta command stub was already execute: true)

Summary: FindingsDelta now resolves the base tree and reads its authoritative findings from Evidence.Store while leaving signature, differential classification, and verdict logic unchanged; unavailable evidence and unresolvable base trees degrade distinctly and remain indeterminate. Review copy and production-path tests name the mix spec.sync/spec.check healing paths, and the final merge-gate tier passed after one rerun of the known timeout flake. Required fixture-leak disclosure: test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs is outside Allowed touches but its legacy committed-state fixture had to seed base evidence for the full suite to remain valid; the sandbox denied writes to the allocated transcript path, so output was durably mirrored at /private/tmp/specled_-csg.4-codex-fc422121.log during the run.

VERIFY: PASS
Session: 8384310d-16ba-4102-b635-60dea30661d7
Log: ~/.claude/projects/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/8384310d-16ba-4102-b635-60dea30661d7.jsonl

Mechanical checks:
- Files touched: 8 (.spec/specs/spec_review.spec.md, .spec/state.json, lib/specled_ex/review.ex, lib/specled_ex/review/findings_delta.ex, lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex, test/mix/tasks/spec_review_task_test.exs, test/specled_ex/review/findings_delta_test.exs, test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs)
- Files outside Allowed globs: 1 (test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs) — disclosed in IMPLEMENTED; adjudicated genuinely behavior-forced (see below), not a violation
- Files matching Out-of-Scope globs: 0 (evidence/**, lib/mix/tasks/**, base_view/branch_check/append_only, docs/priv/skills/.gitignore all untouched)

Semantic checks:
- Spec stubs run: the subject's execute:true command stubs are all test files I ran green — findings_delta_test.exs (findings_delta + findings_delta_base_fallback), review_test.exs, html_test.exs, html_layout_test.exs, spec_review_task_test.exs. 169 tests, 0 failures. Structural gate: mix spec.check --no-run-commands => validate status=pass errors=0 warnings=0 (the single branch finding is the expected cross_cutting guidance, not a failure).
- Requirements coverage:
  - specled.spec_review.findings_delta: covered by findings_delta_test.exs (introduced/resolved/pre_existing classification) + the new "exposes parser-upgrade transients" test (findings_delta_test.exs:~126) + spec_review_task_test.exs "writes a self-contained HTML" (production path, base evidence seeded -> "This change introduces"). Would fail if load_base_findings read the wrong tree or recomputed with the live parser: the parser-upgrade test asserts resolved==["old_parser_kind"], introduced==["new_parser_kind"] purely from the STORED base kinds — a recompute would collapse that split.
  - specled.spec_review.findings_delta_base_fallback: covered by findings_delta_test.exs fallback block (base_reason :base_evidence_absent vs :base_tree_unresolvable, introduced==[], delta_available?==false) + spec_review_task_test.exs "renders an indeterminate verdict and evidence healing instructions" (absent base -> "No base evidence is available for the base tree", names mix spec.sync + mix spec.check, refutes the clean-differential copy). Would fail if the degraded verdict became a pass or dropped the heal-path copy: the task test refutes "This change introduces no findings." and asserts the mix spec.sync/spec.check strings.
- Intent-level scope concerns: none. Classification is BYTE-FOR-BYTE untouched — the findings_delta.ex diff only rewrites moduledoc, swaps @state_path for the Evidence alias, and replaces load_base_findings/parse_findings/git_show_state; signature/1, differential/2, differential_verdict, non_differential_verdict, fallback, severity_counts are outside every hunk. Degraded stays clean?: nil (non_differential_verdict) — indeterminate, never a pass, never an error. state.json writes NOT removed (record_evidence + spec.index/validate write path untouched; the only state.json references in the diff are spec prose and the regenerated cache). normalize_for_state/1 untouched and still pure (lib/specled_ex.ex:92, not in diff). No summary/state schema changes.
- Source-claim tracing: FindingsDelta.classify/3 invoked from Review.build at review.ex:126 (comment block at ~118 updated). load_base_findings/2 resolves TreeHash.base(root, base_ref) (git rev-parse <base>^{tree}) and reads Evidence.Store.read/2 with the STORED findings list authoritative. base_reason distinguishes :base_evidence_absent vs :base_tree_unresolvable (verified in tests). @state_path and git_show_state/2 deleted. html.ex overview copy names the mix spec.sync / mix spec.check heal path (old committed-state.json copy gone). Production write shape confirmed consistent: spec.check.ex record_evidence stores report findings in live subject_id/severity shape, exactly what the tests seed via head_finding, and signature/1 still handles both shapes (subject_id||entity_id).
- Targeted verification: PASS. Flipped stubs: none (findings-delta command stub was already execute:true — run and green). Targeted commands: mix test on the 5 subject test files (169/0); mix spec.check --no-run-commands (validate pass).
- Full-suite verification: not run by verifier (by design)
- Audit-expanded scope: none — there are no prior AUDIT comments on this ticket.

Verdict: PASS

Notes (advisory only):
- html_layout_test.exs (outside Allowed touches) is genuinely behavior-forced and minimal: its change_scoped_overview/repo_state_health test seeded a differential clean verdict via committed .spec/state.json, which FindingsDelta no longer reads. Without moving that seed to Evidence.Store.record the overview would flip to the non-differential headline and the layout assertions would break. Edit is 2 lines removed + alias + 4-line evidence writer; disclosed in IMPLEMENTED. Accepted on the merits.
- The old cross-shape coverage (base normalized entity_id/level vs head live subject_id/severity) is no longer exercised, since stored base evidence is now the live verifier shape. signature/1 still normalizes both, but these tests only feed it the live shape now. Not a gap for this ticket (production writes live shape), just a coverage observation for a future normalize path.
- .spec/state.json was regenerated by my spec.check run and restored via git checkout; stage worktree left clean.

AUDIT: APPROVE
Session: 8384310d-16ba-4102-b635-60dea30661d7
Log: ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/8384310d-16ba-4102-b635-60dea30661d7.jsonl

Reasoning: Independently confirmed the out-of-Allowed edit to html_layout_test.exs is genuinely behavior-forced and minimal. (a) The "clean change" test (html_layout_test.exs:289-330) asserts change_verdict.differential? == true AND clean? == true, and the overview "introduces no findings" / verdict-chip-clean copy. Its old seed committed .spec/state.json{"findings":[]}, which FindingsDelta.load_base_findings no longer reads (it now goes TreeHash.base -> Store.read); with no Store entry the verdict degrades to non_differential_verdict (differential?==false, clean?==nil, findings_delta.ex:88-91) and the headline flips to "Findings could not be attributed to this change." — those exact assertions would fail. So the edit is forced. (b) The edit is 10 lines: alias Evidence.{Entry,Store}, drop the committed-state seed, add tree_hash=git rev-parse HEAD^{tree} / Entry.build / Store.record moved after commit_all (correct — the store is keyed by the committed tree, and main^{tree}==HEAD^{tree} here, so seed key == the production read key). Nothing unrelated smuggled.

Corroborating traces walked myself:
- Classification byte-for-byte untouched: findings_delta.ex diff hunks are only the moduledoc and the load_base_findings region; signature/1, differential/2, differential_verdict, non_differential_verdict (clean?: nil), severity_counts all sit outside every hunk. @state_path/parse_findings/git_show_state deleted; base_reason splits :base_evidence_absent vs :base_tree_unresolvable.
- Production path proven, not seam-faked: spec_review_task_test.exs drives Mix.Tasks.Spec.Review.run -> Review.build -> FindingsDelta.classify. Seeded evidence (record_base_evidence at main^{tree}) -> "This change introduces" and refutes "No base evidence is available"; absent evidence -> indeterminate copy naming mix spec.sync + mix spec.check. Both seed via the real Store.record at the exact key production reads.
- state.json write path (S5) NOT removed: no lib/mix/tasks/** in the diff; only spec prose + regenerated .spec/state.json cache reference it.
- Scope count verified against the actual diff: 8 files touched, exactly 1 outside Allowed (html_layout_test.exs, forced), 0 Out-of-Scope globs (evidence/**, lib/mix/tasks/**, base_view/branch_check/append_only, docs/priv/skills/.gitignore all clean). test/mix/tasks/ is the test tree and is explicitly Allowed, distinct from Out-of-Scope lib/mix/tasks/**.
APPROVED. Rebased onto epic head and merged into specled_-csg/evidence-ledger-split (ff to 41e0257). Closing per orchestrator sign-off.

title: S4: Consumer rewiring: FindingsDelta reads base evidence
